name: Zurich Segway Tour private
description: Discover Zurich Segway Tour private in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Zurich Segway Tour private in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Segway
subcategory.description: Book a tour with the Segway and explore the city. With the maneuverable Segway, you can get to many places on a guided city tour that would not be accessible with a tour bus. At the same time, the visited radius is much larger than on a city tour on foot. The minimum age to ride a Segway in Switzerland is 14 years.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Segway tour in Zurich with an engaging team and great outdoor group activities.
Segway Tour Zurich: Experience exciting tours through the city with friends and family.
Segway Tour Zurich: Experience the city on two wheels and discover the surroundings in an exciting way.
Segway Zurich: Experience an exciting Segway tour through the city with views of nature and group activities.
